name: BuildingHub
description: Load manifest-only community buildings from a local or remote BuildingHub catalog.
keywords: Use the BuildingHub building for the local building catalog.
Turn on reviewed community catalog loading only when you want shared manifest-only buildings.
Point Vibe Research at a local BuildingHub checkout or a reviewed registry JSON URL.
Install community buildings after checking their setup notes and required capabilities.

access.label: Manifest catalog
access.detail: BuildingHub catalogs contribute setup guides and visual buildings only. They do not run executable code inside Vibe Research.

capabilities.name: JSON
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by BuildingHub setup notes.

capabilities.name: URL
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by BuildingHub setup notes.

tools.name: JSON
tools.detail: Environment variable referenced by BuildingHub setup notes.

tools.name: URL
tools.detail: Environment variable referenced by BuildingHub setup notes.

steps.title: Open BuildingHub
steps.detail: Use the BuildingHub building for the local building catalog.

steps.title: Enable community catalogs
steps.detail: Turn on reviewed community catalog loading only when you want shared manifest-only buildings.

steps.title: Choose a source
steps.detail: Point Vibe Research at a local BuildingHub checkout or a reviewed registry JSON URL.

steps.title: Review manifests
steps.detail: Install community buildings after checking their setup notes and required capabilities.
